case_title: ARDIST COOPER JR VS. KAREN TITEN

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-10-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
OPPOSITION PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
DECLARATION OF MARCUS DANIEL MERCHASIN IN OPPOS TO TETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST TO QUASH FILED BY DEFENDANT TITEN, KAREN AKA KAREN VAN NOORD
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, ARGUED, PETITION GRANTED. COURT AWARDS $8,888.43 FROM ARBITRATION, $404.05 IN INTEREST, AND $1,427.00 IN FEES AND COSTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR#7855
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER COOPER JR, ARDIST AS TO RESPONDENT TITEN, KAREN AKA KAREN VAN NOORD
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER COOPER JR, ARDIST AS TO RESPONDENT TITEN, KAREN AKA KAREN VAN NOORD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER COOPER JR, ARDIST HEARING SET FOR JUL-16-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
PROOF OF SERVICE RE: RENOTICE OF HEARING; DECLARATION OF ANNE LEONG IN SUPPORT; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND ORDER FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY.
HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER COOPER JR, ARDIST HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
LAW AND MOTION, 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, OFF CALENDAR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE BY MAIL PER CCP 1005. REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN #8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER JR, ARDIST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TITEN, KAREN AKA KAREN VAN NOORD $8,884.43 PRINCIPAL, $1,427.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $404.05 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,715.48, ARBITRATOR AWARD BY HON. REBECCA WESTERFILED IN JAMS/ENDISPUTE CASE #1100021941. PETITIONER ARDIST COOPER, JR. SHALL RECOVER FR RESPONDENT KAREN TITEN AKA KAREN VAN NOORD THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $10,715.48 PLUS INTEREST AT 10% PER ANNUM AS OF THE DATE OF JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID IN FULL.
